# KRYPTA 2026

KRYPTA 2026 is a multi-track competition organized by the Programming Club of Curtin University Colombo.

## Event Overview

- **Event Name**: KRYPTA 2026
- **Organizer**: Programming Club of Curtin University Colombo
- **Venue**: Curtin University Colombo, Nawam Mawatha, Colombo, Sri Lanka
- **Registration Opens**: September 2026
- **Primary Rounds Start**: November 1, 2026
- **Finals**: November 25-30, 2026
- **Website**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app
- **Contact**: krypta.pc.cuc@gmail.com

## Competition Tracks

### Buildathon Track
- **Description**: A product-building competition where teams design, develop, and present functional software solutions
- **Team Cap**: 50 teams
- **Team Size**: 2-5 members
- **Format**: Online preliminary round + 24-hour on-site final
- **Special Section**: School students section with dedicated workshops (10 teams cap)

### Capture The Flag (CTF) Track
- **Description**: A cybersecurity competition featuring challenges in cryptography, web exploitation, reverse engineering, and forensics
- **Team Cap**: 25 teams
- **Team Size**: 2-5 members
- **Format**: Online qualifier + 12-hour on-site final

### Engineering Track
- **Description**: A practical engineering and problem-solving competition where participants develop evidence-backed solutions
- **Team Size**: 2-5 members
- **Format**: Online preliminary round + 8-hour on-site final

## Important Pages

- **Home**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app
- **Tracks**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app/tracks
- **Buildathon**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app/tracks/buildathon
- **CTF**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app/tracks/ctf
- **Engineering**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app/tracks/engineering
- **Privacy Policy**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app/privacy-policy
- **Terms & Conditions**: https://krypta-2026.vercel.app/terms

## Participation

- All participants receive certificates of participation
- Winning teams receive cash prizes
- Workshops available for school students
- Support workshops available for other participants
